## Testing

- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy`

- [ ] `uv run python -m py_compile sicp.py philips_sicp/*.py tests/*.py`
- [ ] `uv build`

## Risk

- [ ] This change only affects tests/docs/tooling.
- [ ] This change affects packet construction or parsing.
- [ ] This change sends or documents operationally risky commands.
- [ ] README/docs were updated where behavior changed.
